sentence: The new web-based tracking tool was engineered to {blank} the Open Box Audit (OBA) process, eliminating manual data entry errors.
explanation: Streamline 經常配合 process (流程) 使用，指透過自動化提高效率。

sentence: Following the recent Field Return FA reports, it is crucial that we implement corrective actions to {blank} further risks.
explanation: Mitigate risks (減低風險) 係工程同管理上極高頻嘅搭配詞。

sentence: The recurring CQA issues from the ODM factory suggest that their current SMT processes lack {blank} quality controls.
explanation: Rigorous 形容標準或檢查非常嚴密。Lenient 係反義詞。

sentence: Our automated webpage for serial number tracking has drastically reduced the {blank} between reported and actual inventory.
explanation: Discrepancy 專指兩組本應相同嘅數據之間出現咗落差。

sentence: Before launching OBA 2.0, the QE team must {blank} that all cross-factory integration parameters are functioning correctly.
explanation: Verify 係 QA 核心字，指透過測試確認某事物的真確性。

sentence: The sudden spike in defective units was an {blank} that prompted an immediate halt to the production line.
explanation: Anomaly 指偏離預期嘅現象，喺品質監控中非常常用。

sentence: The management team must find a way to {blank} the shipping process to meet the tight deadline.
explanation: Expedite 係商業常用字，代表加快進度。

sentence: Due to the recent losses, the budget is under intense {blank} by the board of directors.
explanation: Under scrutiny 係固定搭配，指受到嚴格審查。

sentence: A comprehensive risk assessment is a mandatory {blank} before the official launch.
explanation: Prerequisite 指事前必須具備嘅條件。

sentence: The legal team needs more concrete evidence to {blank} the claims made in the lawsuit.
explanation: Substantiate 意指提供證據去支持一個主張。

sentence: Ignoring the minor defects early on proved to be highly {blank} to the final project success.
explanation: Detrimental to... 係指對某事物造成損害。

sentence: The lack of clear communication was a major {blank} to the team overall productivity.
explanation: Impediment 係障礙物嘅意思。

sentence: Trying to assemble the IKEA furniture without instructions proved to be a incredibly {blank} and frustrating task.
explanation: Tedious 形容一件工作或者過程又長又悶，令人疲倦，非常適合形容砌傢俬。

sentence: Despite losing his job and his apartment in the same week, Jack remained incredibly {blank} and immediately started looking for new opportunities.

options.trans: 有韌性的 / 具恢復力的

explanation: Resilient 指喺逆境中能夠迅速恢復過來，係讚美人心理質素嘅高級用字。

sentence: My gym trainer is incredibly {blank} about my form; he will correct me even if my elbow is just one inch out of place.

options.trans: 一絲不苟的 / 嚴謹的

explanation: Meticulous 形容人對細節極度注重，一絲不苟。

sentence: Smartphones have become so {blank} that it is almost impossible to imagine a world without them.
explanation: Ubiquitous 係 C1 必考字，解作 everywhere，常用於形容科技或流行現象。

sentence: I tend to {blank} when faced with difficult tasks, often leaving them until the night before the deadline.
explanation: Procrastinate 係「拖延症」嘅動詞，生活必備字。

sentence: Taking a hot bath is a great way to {blank} muscle soreness after a heavy Push Day workout.
explanation: Alleviate 經常用來形容減輕痛楚、壓力或問題。

sentence: Instead of waiting for the perfect moment, she made a {blank} decision to buy a plane ticket to Japan.

options.trans: 一時衝動的 / 自發的

explanation: Spontaneous 形容沒有預先計劃、隨心所欲嘅行動。

sentence: The joy of eating a whole tub of ice cream is {blank}; the guilt, however, lasts much longer.

options.trans: 短暫的 / 轉瞬即逝的

explanation: Ephemeral 係高級文學/生活字，指事物存在時間極短。

sentence: When planning the wedding budget, Jack took a very {blank} approach, prioritizing good food over expensive flowers.
explanation: Pragmatic 形容人做事講求實際、實用，唔搞花臣。

sentence: With the rapid advancement of AI, many traditional clerical jobs are quickly becoming {blank}.
explanation: Obsolete 形容因為有更好嘅替代品出現，而被時代淘汰嘅事物。

sentence: The new tracking tool will {blank} data from QC2 and QMB factories into one unified dashboard.
explanation: Consolidate 經常用於商業或 IT，指將分散嘅數據或資源整合為一。

sentence: If the engine's temperature continues to {blank} erratically, the thermostat might need immediate replacement.
explanation: Fluctuate 指數值（如溫度、體重、股市）不穩定地上下波動。

sentence: Hitting a weight loss {blank} is completely normal; adjusting your macronutrients can help you break through.
explanation: Plateau 喺健身同進度管理中，專指進度停滯不前嘅階段。

sentence: Organizing a large banquet for hundreds of guests requires {blank} attention to the seating arrangements and dietary restrictions.

options.trans: 一絲不苟的 / 嚴謹的

explanation: Meticulous 形容對細節極度重視，非常適合形容大型活動籌備。

sentence: In effective communication, your outward body language must be {blank} with your inner feelings to build trust.
explanation: Congruent 係心理學同溝通學常用字，指內外一致、真誠無偽。

sentence: It is essential to give your muscles enough time to {blank} after a high-intensity push and pull workout.
explanation: Recuperate 指從疲勞、疾病或消耗中恢復過來。

sentence: Ensuring the safety of the field return analysis process is {blank} to preventing workplace hazards.

options.trans: 至關重要的 / 首要的

explanation: Paramount 是 C1 級別形容詞，意指比其他所有事情都更重要。

sentence: The proposed ODM integration project seems highly {blank}, promising a significant reduction in operational costs.
explanation: Lucrative 經常用來形容能帶來豐厚利潤或巨大效益的商業計劃。

sentence: Strict quality control gates will {blank} defective units from moving further down the SMT line.
explanation: Deter someone/something from... 意指制止或阻嚇某事發生。

sentence: Please ensure that all the documents you submit {blank} directly to the current audit scope.
explanation: Pertain to... 是非常正式的商業用語，表示與某事物直接相關。

sentence: After reviewing the yield data, we concluded that returning to the old manufacturing process is no longer a {blank} option.
explanation: Viable option (可行的選項) 是工程與決策時極常用的搭配。

sentence: The QA team must {blank} every single field return report to identify the root cause of the failure.
explanation: Scrutinize 強調極度仔細、嚴格地檢查以找出問題。

sentence: To {blank} the bottleneck in the assembly line, we need a cohesive strategy rather than a temporary fix.
explanation: Alleviate a problem/bottleneck 意思是減輕困難或舒緩樽頸。

sentence: The non-disclosure agreement clearly {blank} that no proprietary data should be shared with third parties.
explanation: Stipulate 常用於合約或法規，意指具體、明確地規定條件。

sentence: We cannot base our next product launch on such {blank} and arbitrary consumer feedback.

options.trans: 模稜兩可的 / 含糊的

explanation: Ambiguous 指意思含糊不清，無法用作可靠的決策依據。

sentence: Any slight {blank} from the standard operating procedures could jeopardize the entire production batch.
explanation: Deviation 指偏離了既定的標準或常軌，在品質工程中是核心字眼。

sentence: The manager's inspiring speech managed to {blank} a highly positive response from the discouraged team.
explanation: Elicit a response 意指成功引發或誘導出某種反應或情緒。

sentence: Allocating extra headcount to the testing phase will greatly {blank} the software's release.
explanation: Facilitate 指提供便利，使事情更容易或更快完成。

sentence: Without adequate sensors, it is difficult to accurately {blank} the pressure changes inside the chamber.
explanation: Gauge 作為動詞時，意指精準地測量或判斷（如壓力、情緒、反應）。

sentence: The system generated an alert warning us that a critical server failure was {blank}.

options.trans: 迫在眉睫的 / 逼近的

explanation: Imminent 常用於警告危險或重大事件即將發生。

sentence: Using unverified components will undoubtedly {blank} the safety rating of the final product.
explanation: Jeopardize 是 C1 級的強烈字眼，表示將事物置於危險之中。

sentence: We must ensure that all customer complaints are treated as {blank} concerns rather than mere annoyances.
explanation: Legitimate concerns 指合理、正當、值得認真對待的擔憂。

sentence: The tension in the meeting room was so {blank} that nobody dared to speak first.

options.trans: 明顯的 / 顯而易見的

explanation: Manifest 作形容詞時，指極度明顯、不言而喻。

sentence: By avoiding the root cause analysis, we will only {blank} the same engineering failures.
explanation: Perpetuate 指令某種情況（通常是壞事）延續下去。

sentence: It is difficult to {blank} the exact financial impact of the recent supply chain delays.
explanation: Quantify 意指將事物（如影響、風險）用數字具體表達出來。

sentence: After the automation upgrade, the manual data entry process became entirely {blank}.
explanation: Redundant 指因為系統升級而變得不再需要、多餘的程序或人手。

sentence: The initial tests passed, but all {blank} evaluations revealed a critical flaw in the design.
explanation: Subsequent 用於描述發生在某事件之後的動作或情況。

sentence: Investors are looking for {blank} evidence of growth before injecting more capital into the startup.
explanation: Tangible evidence 指真實存在、可觸摸或可明確證實的證據。

sentence: Despite hours of debate, the committee finally reached a {blank} decision to proceed with the merger.
explanation: Unanimous decision 是會議中極高級的搭配，表示無人反對、全票通過。

sentence: We must {blank} the test results with an independent third-party laboratory.
explanation: Validate 指透過官方或權威途徑確認某事物的真確性。

sentence: The unprecedented high failure rate certainly {blank} a full-scale factory investigation.
explanation: Warrant (動詞) 在此意指情況嚴重，使得某行動（調查）變得理所當然及必要。

sentence: Implementing the new SMT parameters will {blank} a much higher production efficiency.

options.trans: 產生 / 帶來 (收益/結果)

explanation: Yield 除了指「良率」，作動詞時解作產出或帶來良好結果。

sentence: The project manager needs to properly {blank} resources to ensure the OBA tool is finished on time.
explanation: Allocate resources/budget 是專案管理的核心 C1 詞彙。

sentence: We use the performance of our top-tier competitor as a {blank} to evaluate our own quality standards.
explanation: Benchmark 是用作比較或評估標準的基準點。

sentence: The QA team had to {blank} data from three different factories to generate the final monthly report.
explanation: Compile data/reports 指從不同來源收集資料並編寫成報告。

sentence: The training manual clearly {blank} the boundaries of the resident engineer's responsibilities.
explanation: Delineate 指極度精確、清晰地劃定界線或描述細節。

sentence: High-protein diets are effective because they help {blank} muscle mass while cutting body fat.
explanation: Retain 意指保留不流失，常用於 fitness (retain muscle) 或商業 (retain talent)。

sentence: If we want to hit the 80kg target by August, sticking to the zero-starch dinner rule is {blank}.

options.trans: 極為重要的 / 必須的

explanation: Imperative 表達極度逼切、絕對不能妥協的要求。

sentence: The mechanic warned that ignoring a faulty thermostat could result in {blank} damage to the engine block.
explanation: Irreversible damage 是指造成了無法修復的永久性損害。

sentence: To ensure the wedding runs smoothly, we must prepare a {blank} plan for bad weather at the venue.
explanation: Contingency plan 就是「Plan B」，用以應付突發狀況的備用方案。

sentence: The newly coded HTML web tool was designed to {blank} the tedious process of comparing serial numbers between QC2 and QMB.
explanation: Streamline a process 指透過自動化或重組來提高工作效率。

sentence: The temperature of the Subaru Levorg 1.6 engine was fluctuating erratically, indicating a highly {blank} thermostat.
explanation: Defective 常用於形容機械零件、產品出現故障或瑕疵。

sentence: To push past the 89.9kg threshold, strict {blank} to the high-protein, zero-starch dinner protocol is absolutely imperative.
explanation: Adherence to a rule/diet 係 C1 級別固定搭配，指嚴格遵守。

sentence: Securing the banquet venue at Grand Luhu in Tamsui requires {blank} attention to the guest list and dietary preferences.

options.trans: 一絲不苟的 / 極度嚴謹的

explanation: Meticulous attention 常用於形容籌備大型活動時對細節嘅極度關注。

sentence: After a grueling Push/Pull/Leg training cycle, it is vital to let your muscle fibers {blank} to prevent severe DOMS.
explanation: Recuperate 指經歷巨大消耗或創傷後進行恢復。

sentence: The newly installed security endpoint software will immediately {blank} any unauthorized USB devices from mounting.
explanation: Intercept 喺網絡安全領域指半途攔截、阻止資料或裝置存取。

sentence: A core principle of Satir communication is maintaining a {blank} state, where internal emotions match outward expressions.
explanation: Congruent 係心理學名詞，指內外一致、真誠。

sentence: The sudden spike in defective field returns is a clear {blank} that the current SMT parameters are failing.
explanation: A clear indication 指明顯嘅跡象或徵兆。

sentence: The cat was noticeably {blank} for a few days post-operation, sleeping far more than usual.

options.trans: 昏睡的 / 無精打采的

explanation: Lethargic 形容極度疲倦、缺乏活力，常形容生病或手術後嘅狀態。

sentence: We must prepare a comprehensive {blank} plan in case the August weather disrupts the outdoor wedding photo booth.
explanation: Contingency plan 意思係應急方案 (Plan B)。

sentence: By automating the cross-checking of serial numbers, the new OBA 2.0 interface completely {blank} the risk of human error during inspections.

options.trans: 消除 / 排除 (困難/需要)

explanation: Obviate 係極高階 C2 詞彙，指透過預先採取措施，令某種需要或危險變得不再存在。

sentence: The 8D problem-solving methodology is systematically structured to not just patch, but permanently {blank} the root cause of recurring SMT failures.
explanation: Eradicate a problem 意思係連根拔起，徹底消滅，喺品質工程中非常關鍵。

sentence: When confronted by an angry stakeholder about a field return, it is easy to default to a {blank} stance rather than addressing the core issue calmly.
explanation: Placating 喺 Satir 溝通模式中，專指委曲求全、討好別人嘅防衛姿態。

sentence: The mechanic presented a heavily {blank} invoice for the Subaru's water tank replacement, detailing the cost of every single component and labor hour.
explanation: Itemized bill/invoice 商業必備詞，指將收費細節逐個項目列明嘅清單。

sentence: Coordinating the shuttle buses to Grand Luhu involves {blank} logistical planning to ensure all guests arrive punctually for the ceremony.

options.trans: 錯綜複雜的 / 精細的

explanation: Intricate 形容事物結構複雜，包含極多細節需要處理。

sentence: Strictly adhering to a zero-starch dinner can initially cause fatigue, but the body soon {blank} to the new metabolic state.
explanation: Acclimate to (something) 指身體或心理逐漸適應新環境、新挑戰。

sentence: The intense Pull Day workout left my triceps completely {blank}, requiring an extra day of active recovery before hitting the gym again.

options.trans: 喪失能力的 / 失去行動力的

explanation: Incapacitated 係極高階用字，形容因受傷或極度疲勞而完全無力郁動。

sentence: The company's CrowdStrike Falcon Sensor will immediately {blank} any unrecognized executable files downloaded from an external USB drive.
explanation: Quarantine 喺 IT 資安語境中，指將可疑檔案隔離，防止病毒擴散。

sentence: A resident QE must firmly {blank} a high standard of quality without permanently damaging the collaborative relationship with the ODM partner.
explanation: Uphold a standard/law 指堅守、維護某種標準或原則。

sentence: After the anesthesia wore off, the cat exhibited slightly {blank} behavior, pacing around the living room restlessly instead of sleeping.
explanation: Erratic 形容行為無規律、難以預測，同之前學過嘅 lethargic (昏睡) 形成對比。
